findings.title: Red-before-green runs archived under evidence/ rather than artifacts/smithering/reports/
findings.description: The ticket's convention names artifacts/smithering/reports/ as the archive for red runs, but that directory is empty; the real failing runs live under the ticket-scoped evidence/ dir (smoke-rbg-red.log, tsc-rbg-red.log, secret-scan-rbg-red.log, bun-test-full-suite-rbg-red.log). Substance is fully satisfied — each is a genuine failing run (smoke: Expected 1, Received 0, exit 1; tsc: TS2322, exit 2; secret-scan: detection tests fail; full-suite: 1 fail) and gates.json points at the correct paths. Path-convention deviation only, not a missing-evidence defect.

findings.title: Auto-discovery shim sits beside the named deliverable
findings.description: The named deliverable test/smoke/spine-skeleton.smoke.ts does not match Bun's default *.test.ts discovery glob, so a one-line shim re-exports it for `bun test`. Behavior is identical and documented; `bun test test/smoke/spine-skeleton.smoke.ts` still runs it directly. Harmless convention workaround.

findings.title: src/orchestration/* is additive evidence tooling beyond the four named spine modules
findings.description: Beyond types/replay-harness/matcher/trace, the branch adds pure orchestration + secret-scan helpers and tests that back the machine-checked gates (secret redaction, deterministic routing). They import no runtime/network/key and do not duplicate scope owned by later foundation tickets. Additive and hermetic.
